item.title: Portal
item.description: Deqi Mu performed in Portal, a collaborative chamber music program presented as part of the Soundscape Concert Series in Chengdu, China.

item.title: Melodies Across Time
item.description: Deqi Mu performed in Melodies Across Time, a collaborative chamber music program presented as part of the Aranya Moonrise Concert Series in Hebei, China.

item.title: 37.2°C
item.description: The 37.2°C space performing reading of The Little Prince brought theatrical performance and live music together in Hebei, China.

item.title: Aranya Theatre Festival
item.description: Deqi Mu participated in the 2026 Aranya Theatre Festival as part of Migratory Birds 300, an interdisciplinary collaborative performance in Hebei, China.

item.title: Nashville Marimba Sessions
item.description: Deqi Mu took part in the 2026 Nashville Marimba Sessions, performing solo and chamber music in Nashville, Tennessee.

item.title: Yellow Barn Young Artist Program
item.description: Deqi Mu participated in the 2025 Yellow Barn Young Artist Program in Putney, Vermont, working closely with musicians through chamber music and collaborative performance.

item.title: bio
item.description:
Born in China, Deqi Mu is a percussionist whose work focuses on solo performance, chamber music, and interdisciplinary collaboration. She is particularly interested in contemporary music and collaborative performance across different artistic settings.

Mu began studying music at the age of six, first through drum set before transitioning into classical percussion. As a child, she was featured in China’s Little Rock Star, a documentary produced by Al Jazeera’s Viewfinder series documenting her early musical journey. Through her early experiences as a young performer, she developed a strong interest in exploring different musical environments and forms of expression. In 2019, she moved to the United States to attend Interlochen Arts Academy before continuing her studies at the Peabody Institute of Johns Hopkins University, where she is currently pursuing a degree in Percussion Performance.

item.title: Prose
item.description:
@tailwindcss/typography

View on GitHub!

Beautiful typographic defaults for HTML you don’t control.

The official Tailwind CSS Typography plugin provides a set of prose classes you can use to add beautiful typographic defaults to any vanilla HTML you don’t control, like HTML rendered from Markdown, or pulled from a CMS.

Tailwind CSS IntelliSense extension for Visual Studio Code

<article class="prose lg:prose-xl">
 {{ markdown }}
</article>

To see what it looks like in action, check out our live demo on Tailwind Play. ​
